## Checklist

- [ ] This request does **not** require shipping vendor firmware,
      calibration values, control policies, model weights, or new
      binaries without cleared provenance.
- [ ] This request does **not** silently change the `<license>` in
      either `package.xml` (that is an owner / legal decision — see
      `THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md` §1).
- [ ] I have skimmed `CONTRIBUTING.md` for coding conventions and
      the pre-PR verification steps.
